channel.title: Projects on Indrajit Ghosh
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Indrajit Ghosh

item.title: Fortune’s Origin: Machine Learning Insights into Self-Made Versus Inherited Billionaire Wealth
item.description: This project presents an innovative application of machine learning (ML) in the field of economic analysis, focusing on distinguishing between selfmade billionaires and those with inherited wealth. The central objective is to uncover and understand the patterns and dynamics behind global wealth distribution, particularly in the context of billionaires’ wealth origins. By leveraging Machine Learning robust pattern recognition and predictive analytics capabilities, the study classifies billionaires into two distinct categories: self-made and inherited fortunes.
